01002.name: Daisy Walker
01002.text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used on [[Tome]] [action] abilities.
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, draw 1 card for each [[Tome]] you control.

01008.name: Daisy's Tote Bag
01008.text:
Daisy Walker deck only.
You have 2 additional hand slots, which can only be used to hold [[Tome]] assets.

01031.name: Old Book of Lore
01031.text: [action] Exhaust Old Book of Lore: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches the top 3 cards of his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles the remaining cards into his or her deck.

01032.name: Research Librarian
01032.text: [reaction] After Research Librarian enters play: Search your deck for a [[Tome]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

01034.name: Hyperawareness
01034.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

01035.name: Medical Texts
01035.text: [action] Choose an investigator at your location and test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, heal 1 damage from that investigator. If you fail, deal 1 damage to that investigator.

01036.name: Mind over Matter
01036.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Until the end of the round, you may use your [intellect] in place of your [combat] and [agility].

01065.name: Ward of Protection
01065.text:
Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness treachery card.
Cancel that card's revelation effect. Then, take 1 horror.

01092.name: Manual Dexterity
01092.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01100.name: Hypochondria
01100.text: Revelation - Add Hypochondria to your threat area. Forced - After you take 1 or more damage: Take 1 direct horror. [action] [action]: Discard Hypochondria.

01117.name: Lita Chantler
01117.text:
While you control Lita Chantler, she gains:
"Each investigator at your location gets +1 [combat].
[reaction] When an investigator at your location successfully attacks a [[Monster]] enemy: That investigator deals +1 damage."

01144.name: The Ritual Begins
01144.text: Each enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01145.name: Vengeance Awaits
01145.text: Forced - When this agenda advances: - If the investigators are at Act 1, put the set-aside Ritual Site into play and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there. - If the investigators are at Act 2 or 3, discard all enemies at the Ritual Site and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there.

01149.name: Main Path
01149.text: The Main Path is connected to each other [[Woods]] location. [action]: Resign. "There's nothing we can do to stop them!" You flee from the woods, leaving Arkham to its grisly fate.

01150.name: Arkham Woods
01150.text: Forced - After you enter this location: Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage.

01153.name: Arkham Woods
01153.text: This location is investigated using [agility] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01158.name: Umôrdhoth's Wrath
01158.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (5). For each point you fail by, you must either (choose one): Choose and discard a card from your hand, or take 1 damage and 1 horror.

01163.name: Rotting Remains
01163.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror.

01180.name: Goat Spawn
01180.text: Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - When Goat Spawn is defeated: Each investigator at this location takes 1 horror.

50034.name: Arkham Woods
50034.text: Forced - After you reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag while investigating this location: Reveal and resolve an additional chaos token. (Limit once per test.)

50035.name: Arkham Woods
50035.text: Each enemy at this location cannot take more than 1 damage from each attack performed against it.

50039.name: Acolyte of Umôrdhoth
50039.text:
Prey - Fewest cards in hand.
While engaged with an investigator with no cards in his or her hand, Acolyte of Umôrdhoth cannot be evaded.

50040.name: Chill from Below
50040.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, you must discard 1 card at random from your hand. For each card you cannot discard, take 1 damage.
